commands.summary: 44 tests pass, incl. doctor diagnoses drift, --fix makes a drifted repo valid, and a clean repo is healthy.
On a synthetic drifted repo: diagnosed missing root contract, stale registry, unregistered contract, incomplete _audit; --fix repaired all; re-validates.
On real ForgeLink: 0 errors; one schema-differs WARNING correctly flags the intentional preflight extension for review rather than clobbering it.
